title: Vibrant Grilled Filipino Blood Stew
description: A pungent, crumbly quick-fix Filipino stew that grills blood, bread flour and mushroom stock into a hearty, macrobiotic-friendly dish.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to a medium-high setting and lightly oil the griddle surface.
In a large bowl, whisk pork blood with bread flour until a smooth, thick paste forms.
Add chopped onion, minced garlic, grated ginger, and dried chili flakes to the paste and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture onto the preheated raclette grill pan and cook, stirring continuously, until it thickens and starts to bubble.
Gradually pour in the mushroom stock while stirring to ensure a smooth consistency.
Add soy sauce and black pepper, then continue cooking for another 5 minutes until the flavors meld and the stew is heated through.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then remove from heat.
Serve the vibrant grilled blood stew hot, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh scallions if desired.
